loadError.title: Failed to load
loadError.description: Could not load data. Check your connection and try again.

skillsPage.title: Manage or add skills
skillsPage.subtitle: Track your connected tools and see what else your agents can do.
skillsPage.errorCatalogDesc: Check your internet connection and try again.
skillsPage.emptyInstalledDesc: Explore the available skills tab to get started.
skillsPage.configureMessage: I want to configure the skill {{name}}
skillsPage.manualInstallDesc: Paste a ClawHub skill URL or enter the skill slug to install.
skillsPage.manualInstallError: Failed to install "{{name}}". Check the URL or slug.

channelsPage.title: Connect a channel to chat with DevClaw
channelsPage.subtitle: We take care of installation and updates.
channelsPage.whatsappDesc: Send messages to your super agent directly on WhatsApp.
channelsPage.telegramDesc: Exchange messages with your super agent using Telegram.
channelsPage.discordDesc: Chat with your super agent on Discord servers and channels.
channelsPage.slackDesc: Call your super agent in Slack conversations and channels.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.subtitle: conversations
sessions.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? This action cannot be undone.

jobs.title: Scheduled tasks
jobs.subtitle: Automate your agent's actions with scheduled tasks.
jobs.noJobsDescription: Set up automatic tasks via chat so your agent can perform actions periodically — like reports or reminders.
jobs.removeDescription: Are you sure you want to remove this scheduled task? This action cannot be undone.

apiConfig.title: API Configuration
apiConfig.subtitle: Settings
apiConfig.description: Configure your LLM provider and authentication
apiConfig.baseUrlHint: Leave empty to use the provider's default URL
apiConfig.apiKeyHint: Encrypted with AES-256-GCM and stored in the local vault
apiConfig.modelHint: Enter the model name (e.g., gpt-4o-mini, claude-sonnet-4-20250514)

access.title: Access Control
access.subtitle: Settings
access.description: Manage who can use the assistant
access.pendingMessageHint: Message shown to users waiting for approval
access.ownersDesc: Full access - can manage all settings
access.warningDesc: Removing all owners may lock you out of the assistant. Make sure at least one owner is configured.
access.defaultPendingMessage: You don't have permission to use this assistant. Please contact the administrator.

budget.title: Budget & Usage
budget.subtitle: Settings
budget.monthlyLimitHint: Maximum amount to spend per month
budget.warnPercentHint: Show warning when usage reaches this percentage
budget.actionAtLimitHint: What to do when the budget is reached

memory.title: Memory Settings
memory.subtitle: Settings
memory.storageTypeHint: SQLite is recommended for most use cases
memory.maxMessagesHint: Maximum messages to keep in context
memory.compressionStrategyHint: How to handle when context is too long
memory.embeddingDimensionsHint: Vector dimensions (1536 for OpenAI, 768 for local models)
memory.weightsHint: Vector search is semantic, BM25 is keyword-based. Total must be 100%.
memory.maxResultsHint: Maximum number of results to return

database.title: Database
database.subtitle: Settings
database.backendTypeHint: SQLite is recommended for single-user setups
database.busyTimeoutHint: Milliseconds to wait when database is locked
database.vectorIndexTypeHint: HNSW is faster, IVFFlat uses less memory

groups.title: Group Settings
groups.subtitle: Settings
groups.activationSectionDesc: How the assistant responds in groups
groups.activationModeHint: Choose when the assistant should respond
groups.maxParticipantsHint: Maximum group size to respond to (0 = unlimited)
groups.introMessageHint: Use {{name}} for assistant name, {{trigger}} for the trigger word
groups.quietHoursSectionDesc: Times when the assistant stays silent
groups.quietHoursHint: During quiet hours, the assistant won't proactively respond in groups
groups.defaultIntroMessage: Hi! I'm {{name}}, your AI assistant. Mention me with {{trigger}} to get help!

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.subtitle: Settings
mcp.commandHint: The executable command to run the MCP server
mcp.noServersHint: Add a server to extend the assistant's capabilities
mcp.info1: MCP servers extend the assistant's capabilities with custom tools
mcp.info2: Each server runs as a separate process and communicates via stdio
mcp.info3: Enable/disable servers without deleting them to temporarily control availability

config.title: Configuration
config.subtitle: Settings
config.pageTitle: Fine-tune the intelligence behind your DevClaw.
config.pageDescription: These choices define what your agent can do and how it communicates with you.
config.providerDesc: Manage the model that will drive the reasoning and responses of your agent.
config.baseUrlHint: Leave empty to use the provider's default URL
config.apiKeyHint: Encrypted with AES-256-GCM and stored in local vault
config.visionDesc: Allow your agent to "see" and explain photos or videos sent to it.
config.visionModelHint: If empty, uses the main model
config.transcriptionDesc: Allow your agent to listen to audio and voice messages and turn them into written text.
config.transcriptionLanguageHint: Helps the model recognize the correct language
config.transcriptionApiKeyHint: Required when transcription provider differs from main
config.visionModelPlaceholder: Leave empty to use main model
config.transcriptionBaseUrlHintConfig: Leave empty to use main provider URL
config.transcriptionApiKeyPlaceholder: Uses main API key if empty

system.title: System
system.subtitle: Settings
system.assistantNameHint: Name used in responses and interactions
system.triggerHint: Prefix to activate the assistant in text channels
system.primaryLanguageHint: Language used in responses and date formatting
system.timezoneHint: Used for scheduled jobs and timestamps
system.tip1: The assistant name is used as identity in responses
system.tip2: The trigger should be unique and easy to type
system.tip3: Language affects how the model responds, not just the UI
system.tip4: Timezone is used for scheduled jobs and logs
system.restartServiceHint: Restarts the process and reconnects all channels
system.restartConfirm: Are you sure you want to restart the service?
system.updateConfirm: Are you sure you want to update? The service will restart.
system.updateConfirmDesc: The service will be temporarily unavailable while the update is installed. This usually takes a few seconds.
system.updateSuccess: Update started. The service will restart shortly.
system.noUpdatesAvailable: Checked just now — no updates available

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Settings
integrations.aboutText1: OAuth credentials are securely stored in the local vault with AES-256 encryption
integrations.aboutText2: You can revoke access at any time in each service's settings
integrations.aboutText3: New integrations are added regularly. Suggest new ones on our GitHub

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Settings
webhooks.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this webhook?
webhooks.noWebhooksHint: Create a webhook to receive real-time notifications.
webhooks.deleteConfirmV2: Are you sure you want to remove this webhook? This action cannot be undone.
webhooks.payloadHint: Each webhook receives a POST with Content-Type: application/json containing { "event": "...", "data": {...}, "timestamp": "..." }
webhooks.aboutTip1: Webhooks send HTTP POST notifications to your URLs when specific events occur.
webhooks.aboutTip2: Each webhook can listen to multiple events.
webhooks.aboutTip3: The payload includes the event type and relevant data.
webhooks.aboutWarning: Make sure the webhook URL is accessible and returns a 2xx status. Failed deliveries are not retried.

hooks.title: Hooks
hooks.subtitle: Settings
hooks.noHooksHint: Hooks are added by plugins, skills and the system.
hooks.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}"? This hook can be re-registered by its source.
hooks.aboutTip1: Hooks let plugins, skills and the system observe and modify agent behavior at specific lifecycle points.
hooks.aboutTip2: Hooks with lower priority run first.
hooks.aboutTip3: For blocking events (pre_tool_use, user_prompt_submit), the first hook to block prevents the operation.
hooks.aboutWarning: Disabling system hooks may affect essential features. Use with caution.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Protection & Access Control
security.toolGuardDesc: Extra protection for potentially dangerous actions from your agent.
security.vaultDesc: Manage your external tool passwords connected to DevClaw.
security.authDesc: Manage your main access password to DevClaw.
security.vaultNotConfiguredHint: Run devclaw config vault-init or complete the setup wizard
security.vaultLockedHint: Set DEVCLAW_VAULT_PASSWORD in the environment to unlock access
security.noSecretsHint: Add secrets via CLI or chat
security.secretCount_one: {{count}} secret stored. Values are never displayed.
security.secretCount_other: {{count}} secrets stored. Values are never displayed.
security.secretCount: {{count}} secret(s) stored. Values are never displayed.
security.noAuditHint: History appears as the agent executes tools

setup.title: Setup
setup.subtitle: Initial Configuration
setup.assistantNameHint: This will be the name used in responses
setup.identityTitle: What will your agent's name be?
setup.providerTitle: Select an AI model for your agent
setup.providerDescription: It will be your agent's brain, and you can use any model you want.
setup.providerQuestion: Which AI model provider do you want to use?
setup.howToGetKey: See how to get the key
setup.securityDescription: Set a password and permission level.
setup.passwordHint: Used to access the platform and the password vault
setup.accessModeDescription: Sets the level of freedom the agent will have when executing actions.
setup.modeRelaxedDesc: Actions will be executed without confirmation.
setup.modeStrictDesc: Dangerous actions will only be executed with your confirmation.
setup.modeParanoidDesc: All actions will only be executed with your confirmation
setup.completeFooter: Just a few seconds and it will be worth it.
setup.skillsTitle: Select the initial skills you want to give your agent
setup.skillsDescription: Here we list some of the most used skills, but you can install many others in the DevClaw panel and chat.
setup.skillsInfo: Choose the skills now. The connection with your tools will be made after the initial setup.
setup.skillsErrorLoad: Failed to load skills. Please try again.
setup.validationNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

chat.title: Chat
chat.subtitle: Conversation
chat.noMessages: No messages yet. Start a conversation!

chatPage.howCanHelpDesc: Chat with your assistant to develop code, analyze data, and execute tasks.
chatPage.placeholder: Ask something or describe a task...
chatPage.askOrPick: Ask anything or pick a suggestion
chatPage.enterToSend: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
chatPage.gitStatusPrompt: What is the status of my git repository?
chatPage.apiTestPrompt: Make a GET request to https://httpbin.org/get
chatPage.errorModel: Model not found. Check the model name in Provider & Config.
chatPage.errorAuth: Invalid API key. Check your API key in Provider & Config.
chatPage.errorRateLimit: Rate limit reached. Wait a moment and try again.
chatPage.errorServer: AI provider internal error. Try again in a few seconds.
chatPage.errorConnect: Could not connect to the AI provider. Check the base URL.
chatPage.errorGeneric: Failed to call the AI model. Check your configuration.
chatPage.heroTitle: How can I help you today?

setupPage.restartingDesc: The server is restarting with the new configuration. Please wait...
setupPage.usePasswordHint: Use the password you set in the Security step to log in.
setupPage.providerDesc: Choose the language model that will power your assistant
setupPage.apiKeyHint: Encrypted with AES-256-GCM and stored in the local vault
setupPage.passwordHint: Used to access the Web UI and encrypt the vault
setupPage.channelsDesc: Choose where your assistant will respond to messages
setupPage.channelWhatsappDesc: Connect via QR code using whatsmeow
setupPage.ownerPhoneHint: Country code + area code + number, no spaces. This number will have full access (owner).
setupPage.webchatAlways: The web chat is always available, regardless of channels.
setupPage.skillsDesc: Choose the skills your assistant will use. Start with the Starter Pack and add more from the catalog.
setupPage.skillsLater: Skills can be installed later via chat or CLI

whatsapp.step4: Point your camera at the QR code
whatsapp.e2eHint: End-to-end encrypted. Your messages stay on your device.
whatsapp.mobileHint: To scan the QR code, we recommend accessing this page from a computer.
whatsapp.accessNotAvailable: Access control not available. Make sure WhatsApp is connected.
whatsapp.defaultGroupPolicyDesc: Policy applied to groups without specific configuration
whatsapp.groupsNotAvailable: Group policies not available. Make sure WhatsApp is connected.

settings.autoReadDesc: Messages will be marked as read when processed
settings.sendTypingDesc: Shows when the bot is processing a response
